title: [Let's Do] Lili's Lucky Lures
description: Let's go fishing! We pack our Gear: A Fishing Rod, Fishing Hat, Dynamite... Dynamite? Lili's Lucky Lures adds extra ways to catch Fish, complete with Fish & Rubble Pools and a modest Collection of Decorative Blocks.
body:
![Lili's Lucky Lures](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/lucky_lures.png)

Hooks, Hazards & Hidden Treasures

The adventurous fishing chapter of the Let's Do collection


"Cast wide. Expect anything."


Let's go fishing. Pack your gear: a Fishing Rod, a Fishing Hat… and maybe some Dynamite.
Lili's Lucky Lures adds creative and chaotic new ways to fish, introducing rubble pools, floating debris, traps and tools that turn every river and ocean into an opportunity.
## Cast Into the Unknown
- Floating debris, fish pools and rubble found across rivers and oceans - Throw your bobber into them to uncover unique loot - Discover hidden treasures beyond normal fishing
Not every catch has scales.
## Tools of the Trade
- Bamboo Fishing Rod - Spear for direct action - Dynamite for bold anglers - Redstone-powered fishing contraptions
Fish smarter. Or louder.
## Traps & Displays
- Fish Traps filled with seeds, sweetberries or other bait - Hanging Frames for your biggest catches - Trophy Frames and Fish Nets - Decorative elements to show off your haul

Find the ripple.

Throw the line.

Claim the catch.


Have fun fishing!


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
